summary: Tested 3 new features in Reporte Operativo de Costura: 1) Export CSV button - works correctly, downloads CSV with all report data. 2) Paraliza producción checkbox in incidencia dialog - shows warning, changes button to 'Crear y Paralizar', creates paralizacion in backend. 3) Usuario field shown in expanded incidencia sub-row - new incidencias show the user who created them. All backend tests pass (7/7). All frontend UI tests pass.
features_verified: CSV contains all 16 columns: Persona, Tipo, Corte, Modelo, Tipo Prenda, Entalle, Tela, Cant., Inicio, F. Esperada, Días, Avance %, Últ. Act., D/s Act., Inc., Riesgo
Export button is disabled when no data (grouped.length === 0)
When paraliza checkbox is checked, red warning message appears
When paraliza checkbox is checked, button text changes to 'Crear y Paralizar' with red background
POST /api/incidencias with paraliza=true creates paralizacion and sets registro estado_operativo='PARALIZADA'
POST /api/incidencias with paraliza=false works as before (no paralizacion created)
POST /api/incidencias accepts 'usuario' field and saves it
GET /api/incidencias/{registro_id} returns 'usuario' field for each incidencia
Expanded incidencia sub-row shows 'usuario · fecha_hora' format
Dialog cleanup on close: motivo, comentario, paraliza all reset to default values
Resolving incidencia with paralizacion lifts the paralizacion automatically
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all new UI elements
handleExportCSV correctly escapes CSV values with quotes and handles special characters
handleIncidenciaRapida sends user.nombre_completo || user.username || 'Usuario' as usuario field
Dialog onOpenChange handler properly resets all state (incParaliza, incMotivo, incComentario)
Backend POST /api/incidencias correctly creates paralizacion when paraliza=true and auto-publishes to conversacion
seed_data_creation: Created test incidencia with usuario='Eduard' to verify usuario field display
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features for Reporte Costura are working: Export CSV, Paraliza checkbox, Usuario in incidencias. Old incidencias in DB don't have usuario field (will show empty), only new incidencias created from frontend will show the user name. Test data: Corte 106 has a test incidencia with usuario='Eduard'.
